title: Sorted statuses in OSC
description: To find the sorted status log in the OSC table
query:
SELECT 
	count(DISTINCT order_id)
    FROM courier_realtime_datastream.public_order_status_changes
    WHERE 1=1
	AND (updated_at IS NOT NULL or updated_at is null)
	AND status_id = 9
	AND type in (12)
    AND DATE(created_at) BETWEEN '2026-02-01' AND '2026-02-10'

title: billing_status_id
query:
CASE billing_status_id
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Waiting for accounts approval'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Approved by accounts'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Invoice generated'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'Invoice processing'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Invoice paid'
  END AS payment_status

title: dispatch_requests
query:
WHEN 0 THEN 'Requested'
	    WHEN 1 THEN 'Attempting'
	    WHEN 2 THEN 'Dispatched'
	    WHEN 3 THEN 'TimedOut'
	    WHEN 4 THEN 'Ineligible'
	    WHEN 5 THEN 'ScheduleForNextDay'

query:
0 = 
1 = accepted
2 = rejected
3 = timed_out
4 =

title: status_id (order_invoices)
query: Waiting for accounts approval = 1

title: Distance ID Mapping
query:
CASE
    	WHEN pickup_hub = 'ISD' AND delivery_hub = 'ISD' THEN 1
    	WHEN pickup_hub = 'ISD' AND delivery_hub = 'OSD' THEN 2
    	WHEN pickup_hub = 'ISD' AND delivery_hub = 'RSD' THEN 3
    	WHEN pickup_hub = 'RSD' AND delivery_hub = 'ISD' THEN 4
    	WHEN pickup_hub = 'RSD' AND delivery_hub = 'RSD' THEN 5
    	WHEN pickup_hub = 'RSD' AND delivery_hub = 'OSD' THEN 6
    	WHEN pickup_hub = 'OSD' AND delivery_hub = 'ISD' THEN 7
    	WHEN pickup_hub = 'OSD' AND delivery_hub = 'RSD' THEN 8
    	WHEN pickup_hub = 'OSD' AND delivery_hub = 'OSD' THEN 9
	END AS distance_id

title: delivery_type(price_plan_slab)
query:
on_demand = 12 
regular = 48

title: merchant type
query:
CASE m.merchant_type 
    WHEN 0 THEN 'Regular_merchant'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'C2C_Kiosk_merchant'     
	WHEN 2 THEN 'B2B_merchant'
	WHEN 3 THEN 'C2C_agent'
	WHEN 4 THEN 'corporate_merchant'
	WHEN 5 THEN 'Book_merchant'
	WHEN 6 THEN 'Point_merchant'
	WHEN 7 THEN 'Post_paid_merchant'
    ELSE 'Other'

title: merchant_wallet_infos
query:
merchant_wallet_infos AS (
    SELECT 
        merchant_id, 
        wallet_id
    FROM hermes.merchant_wallet_infos
    WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY updated_at DESC) = 1
)

title: clusters
query:
clusters as (
SELECT *
from courier_realtime_datastream.public_clusters
WHERE updated_at is not null
and country_id =1 
)

title: regions
query:
regions as (
SELECT *
from hermes.regions
WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY updated_at DESC) = 1
)

title: users
query:
with users as (
SELECT *
from courier_realtime_datastream.public_users
WHERE updated_at is not null
and country_id =1 
)

title: Kobiraj users
query:
with users AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM courier_kobiraj_realtime_dstream.public_users
    WHERE updated_at IS NOT NULL
      AND created_at < TIMESTAMP(CURRENT_DATE)
)

title: order_invoices
query:
order_invoices AS (
  SELECT
    *
    -- COALESCE(collectable_amount,0) as collectable_amount,
    -- COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(meta, '$.collected_amount') AS FLOAT64) / 100,0) AS collected_amount,
    -- COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(meta, '$.cash_on_delivery_fee') AS FLOAT64) / 100,0) AS cod_fee,
    -- COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(meta, '$.delivery_fee') AS FLOAT64) / 100,0) AS delivery_cost,
    -- COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(meta, '$.additional_charge') AS FLOAT64) / 100,0) AS additional_charge,
    -- COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(meta, '$.discount') AS FLOAT64) / 100,0) AS discount,
    -- COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(meta, '$.promo_discount') AS FLOAT64) / 100,0) AS promo_discount,
    -- COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(meta, '$.compensation_cost') AS FLOAT64) / 100,0) AS compensation_cost,
    -- SAFE_CAST(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(meta, '$.total_weight') AS FLOAT64) AS weight

  FROM courier_realtime_datastream.public_order_invoices
  WHERE updated_at IS NOT NULL
    AND country_id = 1 )

title: point_orders
query:
point_orders AS (
  SELECT consignment_id, is_paid_by_sender,delivery_fee,payout_at
  FROM courier_realtime_datastream.public_point_orders
WHERE created_at is not NULL )

title: hub_payment_order_invoices
query:
hub_payment_order_invoices AS (

  SELECT order_invoice_id,hub_payment_id
  FROM hermes.hub_payment_order_invoices
  where created_at is not null
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY hub_payment_id
ORDER BY created_at DESC) = 1 )

title: hub_payments
query:
hub_payments AS (
  SELECT id, hub_id , transaction_id, bank_name, submitted_amount
  FROM courier_realtime_datastream.public_hub_payments
  WHERE updated_at is not NULL 
        AND country_id =1 )

title: hubs
query:
hubs as (
SELECT *
from courier_realtime_datastream.public_hubs
WHERE updated_at is not null
and country_id =1 
)

title: payment_invoices
query:
payment_invoices AS (
    SELECT
      *
    FROM
      `courier_realtime_datastream.public_payment_invoices`
    WHERE
      updated_at IS NOT NULL
    QUALIFY
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY
          id
        ORDER BY
          updated_at DESC
      ) = 1
  )

title: transfer_status
query:
transfer_status AS (
    SELECT
      *
    FROM
      hermes.transfer_status
  )

title: zones
query:
zones AS (
    SELECT
      *
    FROM
      hermes.zones
    WHERE
      created_at IS NOT NULL
    QUALIFY
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY
          id
        ORDER BY
          updated_at DESC
      ) = 1
  )

title: stores
query:
stores AS (
    SELECT
      *
    FROM
      hermes.stores
    WHERE
      created_at IS NOT NULL
    QUALIFY
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY
          id
        ORDER BY
          updated_at DESC
      ) = 1
  )

title: merchants
query:
merchants AS (
    SELECT
      *
    FROM
      `courier_realtime_datastream.public_merchants`
    WHERE
      updated_at IS NOT NULL
     AND country_id = 1
  )

title: merchant_users
query:
merchant_users AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM hermes.merchant_users
  WHERE updated_at IS NOT NULL
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY id
    ORDER BY updated_at DESC
  ) = 1
)

title: Merchant Type Keys Desc
OSC Type
Agent Role Type
query:
CASE role_type
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Delivery Agent'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'Pickup Agent'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Van Duty Agent'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'On-Demand Agent'
        WHEN 5 THEN null
		WHEN 11 THEN 'Driver Agent'
		WHEN 16 THEN 'Sort Agent'
        ELSE NULL
    END AS role_type

title: Orders Table
query:
with orders as  (
    SELECT *
    FROM `courier_realtime_datastream.public_orders`
    WHERE updated_at IS NOT NULL and country_id = 1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT *
    FROM `courier_realtime_datastream.public_archived_orders`
    WHERE updated_at IS NOT NULL and country_id = 1
)
